title: App Modernization - Now Make It Smarter
description: Microsoft Reactor session (30 min). Modernization is the foundation; this session adds targeted AI to an already-modernized .NET 10 / Aspire eShopLite app. Recording/timeline plan for ElBruno.PresenterTimer.

sections.title: Opening
sections.notes: Slides. Premise: modernization is the foundation, not the finish line. 'The app is already modernized - now what?' Bridge from the previous Aspire/modernization session.

sections.title: Baseline app
sections.notes: Demo. eShopLite running locally: Aspire dashboard, resources, logs/traces, catalog, existing search. Not a rewrite - an incremental improvement story. Avoid Aspire internals deep dive.

sections.title: Demo 1 - Product Discovery
sections.notes: Scenario 14 (ProductDiscoveryCopilot). CODE WALKTHROUGH - no app run. Read MemoryContext.cs: embed catalog -> vector search top 3 -> Score > 0.3 gate -> grounding prompt. Point: the model only sees catalog products the search returned.

sections.title: Demo 2 - Observability Assistant (local AI)
sections.notes: Scenario 13 (ObservabilityAssistantFoundryLocal). LIVE local AI with Foundry Local. Run searches, trigger a failed search, call observabilityassistant for a 10-min window. Findings: root cause + next actions, no data leaves the box. Fallback: saved sample output.

sections.title: Demo 3 - Store Intelligence Report
sections.notes: Scenario 15 (StoreIntelligenceReport). Standalone Blazor 'intelligence' app. Refresh live signals -> Generate report (source: ai badge). App signals become a business summary: top intents, failed searches, product gaps, next actions. Fallback: saved report.

sections.title: Demo 4 - MCP Store Tools
sections.notes: Scenario 16 (MCPStoreOperationsTools). App capabilities exposed as MCP tools. Select tools, ask 'what gear do I need for a rainy hike this weekend' -> grounded answer WITH product grid. Show Aspire traces (chat + eshopmcpserver /message). Not a generic chatbot.

sections.title: Demo 5 - A2A Store Operations Network
sections.notes: Scenario 17 (A2AStoreOperationsNetwork). Specialized agents collaborate: Catalog + Promotions + Business Insights. A2A search 'winter camping' -> enriched cards (Stock/Promotions/Reviews). Show an agent card at /.well-known/agent-card.json. Fallback: architecture diagram.

sections.title: Deploy with Aspire
sections.notes: Slides only. Same app model has a deployment path: aspire publish / aspire deploy -> Azure Container Apps, App Service, Kubernetes, Docker Compose. Aspire keeps the modernization foundation portable.

sections.title: Closing
sections.notes: Slides. 'Modernization is not the finish line - it is the foundation that lets us make apps smarter.' Recap the top 5 pain points and the closing line.
